changeSet.author: upesh.karki
changeSet.createView: SELECT m.id AS member_id, m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name, m.email, COUNT(e.id) AS total_expense_count, COALESCE(SUM(e.amount), 0) AS total_expenses, COUNT(DISTINCT e.category) AS category_count, MAX(e.expense_date) AS latest_expense_date FROM member m LEFT JOIN expense e ON e.member_id = m.id GROUP BY m.id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email

changeSet.author: upesh.karki
changeSet.createView: SELECT m.id AS member_id, m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name, COALESCE(sg.income, 0) AS monthly_income, COALESCE(SUM(e.amount), 0) AS total_expenses, COALESCE(sg.income, 0) - COALESCE(SUM(e.amount), 0) AS net_savings, COUNT(DISTINCT sg.id) AS active_goals, COALESCE(SUM(sg.target_amount), 0) AS total_goals_target, COALESCE(SUM(sg.current_amount), 0) AS total_goals_saved FROM member m LEFT JOIN expense e ON e.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN savings_goal sg ON sg.member_id = m.id AND sg.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY m.id, m.first_name, m.last_name, sg.income

changeSet.author: upesh.karki
changeSet.createView: SELECT member_id, category, COUNT(*) AS expense_count, SUM(amount) AS total_amount, AVG(amount) AS avg_amount, MIN(expense_date) AS first_expense, MAX(expense_date) AS last_expense FROM expense GROUP BY member_id, category
